'''ngaluhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacay|vacay]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacay|vacay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngaluhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngælihith|ngælihith]] || [[word:ngælihij|ngælihij]] || [[word:ngælihish|ngælihish]] || [[word:ngælihi|ngælihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngaluluhuth|ngaluluhuth]] || [[word:ngaluluhuj|ngaluluhuj]] || [[word:ngaluluhush|ngaluluhush]] || [[word:ngaluluhu|ngaluluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngaluhuth|ngaluhuth]] || [[word:ngaluhuj|ngaluhuj]] || [[word:ngaluhush|ngaluhush]] || [[word:ngaluhu|ngaluhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalufhuth|ngalufhuth]] || [[word:ngalufhuj|ngalufhuj]] || [[word:ngalufhush|ngalufhush]] || [[word:ngalufhuf|ngalufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngaluhuthu|ngaluhuthu]] || [[word:ngaluhuju|ngaluhuju]] || [[word:ngaluhushu|ngaluhushu]] || [[word:ngaluhuku|ngaluhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngaluhuth|ngaluhuth]] || [[word:ngaluhuj|ngaluhuj]] || [[word:ngaluhush|ngaluhush]] || [[word:ngaluhu|ngaluhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngaluhuthul|ngaluhuthul]] || [[word:ngaluhujul|ngaluhujul]] || [[word:ngaluhushul|ngaluhushul]] || [[word:ngaluhukul|ngaluhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngaluhuthuthu|ngaluhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngaluhujuju|ngaluhujuju]] || [[word:ngaluhushushu|ngaluhushushu]] || [[word:ngaluhuku|ngaluhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngaluhuthun|ngaluhuthun]] || [[word:ngaluhujun|ngaluhujun]] || [[word:ngaluhushun|ngaluhushun]] || [[word:ngaluhukun|ngaluhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngaluhuthuoro|ngaluhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngaluhujuoro|ngaluhujuoro]] || [[word:ngaluhushuoro|ngaluhushuoro]] || [[word:ngaluhukuoro|ngaluhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
